name: Cheese Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter and flour together well until combined.
2. Add the grated cheddar cheese and mix until a dough forms.
3. Work in the cayenne pepper into the mixture.
4. Shape the mixture into small, marble-sized balls.
5. Place the nuggets on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 10 minutes.
7. Makes approximately 36 nuggets.
